info.title: Motive Open API Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Motive's Open API spans users, vehicles, vehicle gateway devices, groups, HOS logs, locations, messages, inspection reports, IFTA reports, fault codes, driver performance events, and webhooks for connected fleet workflows.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Motive Open API. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Motive's public developer portal describes a single Open API surface covering users, vehicles, vehicle gateway devices, groups, HOS logs, locations, messaging, inspection reports, IFTA reports, fault codes, driver performance events, and webhooks. That category mix combines fleet asset master data with event-oriented operational and compliance data, while the published reference and marketplace language show that the API is intended for production integrations and app workflows rather than read-only exports. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
